name: RS-based Tier Promotion
what_it_solves: Lifts MECHANISTIC axis results to STRONG when the tumor is RS_high AND the axis is RS-sensitive AND independent evidence exists.
how_it_solves: See attributes.code_verbatim — canonical function from CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP Ch 3 with explicit early-exits at every guard.
why_it_exists: Encodes the domain claim 'in a high-replication-stress background, a mechanistic hint on an RS-sensitive checkpoint is worth more'. Guards prevent it from over-writing VALIDATED / STRONG or from firing on non-RS axes.
